selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 兔子；vi. 猎兔
words.definition: n. any of various burrowing animals of the family Leporidae having long ears and short tails; some domesticated and raised for pets or food

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 男孩
a. 真的, 真实的, 实际的, 实在的, 不动(产)的, 实数的；n. 实数, 现实
words.definition: a. being or occurring in fact or actuality; having verified existence; not illusory; not ghosts"

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 马, 骑兵, 脚架；vi. 骑马, 取笑
words.definition: n. solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped domesticated since prehistoric times

words.translation: n. 皮肤, 皮；vt. 剥皮, 在...植皮
words.definition: n. a natural protective body covering and site of the sense of touch

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. the organized beliefs of a period or group or individual

words.translation: n. 结束, 完结；a. 靠近的, 亲近的, 亲密的, 严密的, 关闭的, 狭窄的, 秘密的
n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动
words.definition: n. a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: n. 花, 开花植物, 精华, 盛时；vi. 开花, 发育, 旺盛, 成熟
words.definition: n. a plant cultivated for its blooms or blossoms

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: a. 奇怪的, 陌生的, 生疏的, 不熟悉的, 不可思议的, 外行的, 外地的, 异乡的
words.definition: a. being definitely out of the ordinary and unexpected; slightly odd or even a bit weird

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: n. 托儿所, 苗圃, 温床
words.definition: n. a child's room for a baby

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: n. 睡眠, 静止, 昏迷, 麻木, 长眠, 冬眠；vi. 睡觉, 睡眠, 静止
words.definition: n. a natural and periodic state of rest during which consciousness of the world is suspended

words.translation: pron. 任何事
words.definition: n. Any object, act, state, event, or fact whatever; thing of

words.translation: n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: a. 近的, 近亲的, 近似的；adv. 接近, 亲近
words.definition: a. not far distant in time or space or degree or circumstances

words.translation: n. 鼻子, 突出部分, 嗅觉；vt. 嗅到, 探出, 用鼻子触

words.translation: n. 玩具, 小玩艺儿, 小型的东西, 消遣；a. 供玩耍的, 作为玩具的
words.definition: n. a nonfunctional replica of something else (frequently used as a modifier)

words.translation: a. 美丽的
words.definition: a. delighting the senses or exciting intellectual or emotional admiration

words.translation: a. 快乐的, 幸福的, 愉快的, 恰当的
words.definition: a. enjoying or showing or marked by joy or pleasure

words.translation: prep. 在...之中
words.definition: prep. Alt. of Amongst

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: r. in or to or toward the rear

words.translation: adv. 宁可, 稍微, 相当
words.definition: r. on the contrary; rather (or instead), he wrote her a letter"

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的
words.definition: n. a charge of ammunition for a single shot

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的
words.definition: n. a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of greatest lightness (bearing the least resemblance to black)

words.translation: n. 草, 草原, 牧场
words.definition: n. narrow-leaved green herbage: grown as lawns; used as pasture for grazing animals; cut and dried as hay

words.translation: n. 魔术, 魔法；a. 魔术的, 有魔力的, 不可思议的

words.translation: n. 春天, 弹簧, 跳跃, 弹性, 活力, 泉, 源泉；a. 春天的

words.translation: a. 令人惊奇的, 奇妙的, 极好的
n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: a. 能干的, 能够的
words.definition: a. (usually followed by `to') having the necessary means or skill or know-how or authority to do something

words.translation: adv. 以前
words.definition: r. in the past

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: a. 别的, 其他的；adv. 另外, 否则, 不然
words.definition: a. & pron. Other; one or something beside; as, Who else is

words.translation: n. 脸, 面容, 正面, 外观；vt. 面对, 朝, 正视, 面临
words.definition: n. the front of the human head from the forehead to the chin and ear to ear

words.translation: n. 土地, 战场, 场地, 地面, 范围；a. 土地的, 地面上的
words.definition: n. a position to be won or defended in battle (or as if in battle)

words.translation: vi. 发生, 发生, 恰巧
words.definition: v. come to pass

words.translation: n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
n. 荒野, 荒地；a. 野性的, 野蛮的, 野生的, 失控的, 任性的, 杂乱的, 轻率的, 狂热的, 疯狂的

words.translation: n. 跳跃, 跳动, 暴涨, 惊跳；vt. 跳跃, 跃过, 突升, 使跳跃

words.translation: n. 图画, 照片, 景色, 美丽如画的人(或物), 化身, 生动的描述, 想像, 形象思维；vt. 画, 拍摄, 用图说明, 描写, 想像
words.definition: n. a visual representation (of an object or scene or person or abstraction) produced on a surface

words.translation: a. 软的, 温和的, 柔和的, 柔滑的, 温柔的, 软弱的, 坡度小的, 笨的, 纸币的；n. 柔软的东西, 笨人, 纸币

words.translation: n. 夏季, 全盛时期；vi. 避暑, 过夏天

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 差不多
n. 休息, 中断, 破裂处, 绝交, 破晓, 突变；vt. 打破, 弄破, 弄坏, 破坏, 违反, 打断, 削弱, 放弃

words.translation: n. 小心, 照料, 忧虑；vi. 关心, 介意

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的

words.translation: a. 坚硬的, 硬的, 难的, 艰苦的, 困难的, 坚固的, 猛烈的, 艰难的, 结实的, 确实的；adv. 坚硬地, 努力地, 辛苦地, 接近地, 猛烈地, 牢固地
words.definition: a. dispassionate;

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶

words.translation: n. 种类, 性质, 方式；a. 亲切的, 仁慈的, 和蔼的

words.translation: vt. 遗失, 损失, 丢失, 使失去, 错过, 浪费, 迷失, 使迷路, 输去, 使沉溺于；vi. 受损失, 失败

words.translation: n. 经过, 要隘, 途径, 通行, 护照, 及格；vt. 经过, 越过, 通过, 批准, 度过, 传递, 忽略

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面
